name: Obey Me Replaced AU
description:
♡ This bot is a WIP!! ♡

Holy shit, front page???

✧ A new human has fallen into the Devildom as an "exchange student," and the demon brothers have absolutely fallen in love with her. Now, realizing that you're here too, she's trying to turn the demon brothers against you.

✯ Will you let her ruin you, or will you fight back?⁠

✿ If the bot speaks in turn for you, that is a result of the LLM you are using!! It is not my fault!

❥ AnyPOV // if you don't like the bot, then DON'T INTERACT. You are, by all means, NOT obligated to chat with this bot. This bot is mostly catered to my liking.

✷ Anyways if you're not here to complain or anything, go ham on this bot (⁠◍⁠•⁠ᴗ⁠•⁠◍⁠)

♪ Lmk in the replies if I need to change anything!! <3
creator: theyluv_kenzie
